messages.content:
## Leaderboard Rules
> 2 lives
> Time limit of 15 minutes.
> If you crash twice or run out of time, your score will reset. 
> If you reset/crash while having a higher point value than your PB, it will override it, and you will have your new PB.

**Certified**
> To get Certified, you must be within the top 0.1% of all scores, and it is capped at max to the top 75 players.

**Ranks**
> Certified → 0.1%/Top 75 Capped
> Sanctioned (I, II, III) → 1% - 0.1%
> Ghost (I, II, III) → 5% - 1%
> Licensed (I, II, III) → 10% - 5%
> Marked (I, II, III) → 25% - 10% 
> Noticed (I, II, III) → 50% - 25% 
> Listed (I, II, III) → 100% - 50%

** **
## Point System Overview
> Points are gained through cutting up between traffic cars. There are bonuses given to the following:
> * **Realistic Traffic** = Speed Multiplier bonus
> * **Realistic physics** = Combo Bonus per car passed
> * **First Person Camera** = Combo Bonus per car passed.
> * **Aggro Multiplier** *increases* as you pass cars in *different lanes consecutively*. This multiplier will *decrease* if you keep passing cars in the *same lane consecutively*. In order to bring it back up again, you'll need to pass a car in a different lane.

> -# All of these bonuses stack.
